---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaves incorrectly
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 121, Firefox 122]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Device: [e.g. desktop, iPhone 14]
- Viewport size: [e.g. 1920x1080, 375x667]
- Theme: [light, dark, system]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. console errors, network logs).
